name: Event Channel Managarr
description: Automates channel visibility by hiding channels without events and showing those with events, based on EPG data and channel names.
author: PiratesIRC

actions.label: Validate Configuration
actions.description: Test and validate all plugin settings

actions.label: Update Schedule
actions.description: Save settings and update the scheduled run times

actions.label: Dry Run (Export to CSV)
actions.description: Preview which channels would be hidden/shown without making changes

actions.label: Run Now
actions.description: Immediately scan and update channel visibility based on current EPG data

actions.label: Remove EPG from Hidden Channels
actions.description: Remove all EPG data from channels that are disabled/hidden in the selected profile

actions.label: Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all CSV export files created by this plugin

actions.label: Cleanup Orphaned Tasks
actions.description: Remove any orphaned Celery periodic tasks from old plugin versions

actions.label: Check Scheduler Status
actions.description: Display scheduler thread status and diagnostic information
